definition:
family of fuses following the same physical design principles with respect to the shape of the fuse-links, type of contact, etc.
EXAMPLE: NH, BS, NF, H

definition_ml.en:
family of fuses following the same physical design principles with respect to the shape of the fuse-links, type of contact, etc.
EXAMPLE: NH, BS, NF, H
definition_ml.fr:
famille de fusibles suivant les mêmes principes de conception mécanique de forme des fusibles, de type de contact, etc. 
EXEMPLE: NH, BS, NF, H
definition_ml.de:
Sicherungsfamilie, die in Bezug auf die Form des Sicherungseinsatzes, der Art des Kontakts etc. den selben physikalschen Designprinzipien folgt.
BEISPIEL:  NH, BS, NF, H
definition_ml.zh:
具有相同物理设计原理（关于熔断体形状、触头类型等）的熔断器族
示例：NH、BS、NF、H
